description_long: This is a semi-circular, wall-mounted sink with a smooth, white exterior and a flat back edge designed for flush installation against a wall. The sink features a single, deep basin with a rounded front and a flat rear section that houses a modern, angular faucet. On the rear ledge, there are several accessories: a soap dish, a round soap bar, and a toothbrush, all neatly arranged. The drain is centrally located at the bottom of the basin, and the plumbing is visible beneath the sink. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for public or semi-public urban environments such as restrooms, parks, or service areas.
description: A modern, semi-circular wall-mounted sink with a central drain, angular faucet, and accessories on the rear ledge. The design is minimalist and functional, with a smooth white finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the semi-circular basin, faucet, and accessories on the rear ledge.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved basin and the arrangement of accessories on the ledge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back, faucet, and visible plumbing beneath the sink.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the faucet, soap dish, and the depth of the basin.
